## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: In validate.sh, LINT_PID, RUFF_PID, and MYPY_PID are assigned but never explicitly waited on. The top-level bare 'wait' covers all background children, so this is functionally harmless. The unused PID variables add noise.
File: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh
Category: hygiene
